3040350.name: We Are Locked
3040350.description:
Trapped in a haunted house, your only chance of survival is to stay hidden and find the key to escape. Ghosts roam the halls, reacting to every sound and movement. Use your surroundings to stay out of sight, uncover clues, and navigate the eerie darkness. Will you escape, or become another lost soul in the house?

Features:

  • Stealth-based horror – Stay quiet and out of sight to avoid the ghosts.

  • Dynamic AI – Ghosts react to sound, movement, and your actions.

  • Atmospheric environment – Explore a chilling and immersive haunted house.

  • Puzzle-solving – Find hidden key to escape.

Can you outsmart the spirits and find your way out?
3040350.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
